description: MineSkin is a service for generating signed Minecraft skin texture data from uploaded images, URLs, or player identities. It automates creation of valid skin signatures that can be used by Minecraft-related tools and plugins.
summary: MineSkin exposes a REST API at https://api.mineskin.org with an OpenAPI spec and a discovered MCP endpoint at `https://mineskin.org/.well-known/mcp`; the API uses MineSkin-issued API keys as Bearer tokens, while MCP auth could not be confirmed.
